name: gestorpedidos-soaco
description: Gestor de Pedidos — interno: 5180, externos: 5173+5174+5051, API: 4000.

scripts.dev:core: concurrently -n api,fe,watchdog,watchdog-fe -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:fe-all" "node scripts/watchdog-backend.cjs" "node scripts/watchdog-vite-interno.cjs"
scripts.dev:core:quiet: concurrently -n api,fe -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:fe-all"
scripts.dev:fe-all: concurrently --restart-tries 50 --restart-after 3000 -n interno,p5173,p5174,p5051 -c green,yellow,blue,magenta "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:frontend:5173" "npm run dev:frontend:5174" "npm run dev:frontend:5051"
scripts.dev:full: npm install && npm run dev:full:backend && npm run dev:full:frontend && npm run dev
scripts.dev:full:backend: npm install --prefix backend && npm run generate --prefix backend
scripts.build:production: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build:frontend --prefix backend
